chapter_title: Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text: The board of the department may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 622. Spec. Provisions & Exceptions for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 622.002 — Rulemaking Authority

The board of the department may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1345 (S.B.1420), Sec. 66, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board of the department may adopt rules necessary to implement and enforce this chapter.
